reviews.author: Alok pandey
reviews.title: *Small Conveniences give a luxury fee*
reviews.body: Felt like i purchased a premium product when I had bags in both hands and the door opened anyway via face unlock. If you switch from a normal lock, there will be multiple instances like these that will feel like a big upgrade. Security is also a very important aspect. I monitored the entire installation process and understood how the lock functions from the technician. Lock provides top tier safety according to the price it demands. I would categorize this as a good purchase. Features are very useful. Recommended to anyone who's looking for reliable safety and convenience.

reviews.author: Deeksha tripathi
reviews.title: WORKS WELL. LOOKS 10/10*
reviews.body: Performance is what you would expect from something in this price range. Face unlock is fast, app is stable, auto-lock works well also. No complaints there. What surprised me was the way my door looks now. The handleless design is very clean. Gets noticed by everyone who visits our house. Installation was done on time and the technician was professional. Set up everything properly and gave a detailed demo. Great experience.

reviews.author: Ayesha Tabassum
reviews.title: Practical purcahse for long run
reviews.body: I say that because- 1. Its as sturdy as it gets with 5 bolts 2. Looks good, very sleek, very futuristic 3. Services of the company are good. 4. App integration is smooth and UI is good. 5. Bonus point for the face unlock Read more

reviews.author: Hamaad malik
reviews.title: Nice Buy
reviews.body: Little skeptical on buying as this is slightly pricy from Others but After Installation it's really Worth it. The panels, Material and overall built quality is very premium. Mortice is very tough and heavy. What I really liked is that it came with additional plate to cover previous holes. No issues observed so far in any features will update in case anything happens.

reviews.author: Sita Ram
reviews.title: Great look
reviews.body: Good product. Looks very nice and sleek. Go for it if you like design and reliability. Although battery performance: will check
